$schema_note: CANONICAL, SINGLE SOURCE of all global fleet metadata for ClickUp Super Agents. Every structured fact about an agent (identity, track, version, status, channels, lane, triggers) lives HERE and nowhere else. Per-agent folders hold ONLY non-duplicated content: preferences.md (the agent's own config self-mirror), working-notes.md (next spec / revision log), and audits/ (dated audit records). Never hand-mirror any field below into a folder file. index.html renders this; index.md points at both.

defined_by: ClickUp Super Agent — Creation & Setup Checklist (docs/12cwjm-54133/12cwjm-74773)

status_legend.up-to-date: Full-Standard agent verified against current golden-standard version.
status_legend.needs-declaration: Full-Standard agent with no repo declaration folder yet.
status_legend.needs-re-audit: Standard bumped or config changed; re-verify.
status_legend.behind: Known gaps against the current golden standard.
status_legend.inventory-only: Task-Specific / Exempt; tracked but not held to the full standard.
